name: Cain
text: I mean—it's just a lot, Lyra! Every day is some new crisis. It's exhausting for me too, okay?

name: Lyra
text: Oh. I didn't realize I was... a chore.

name: Cain
text: No! That’s not what I meant. I’m just stressed about the project, Lyra, wait!

name: Lyra
text: You're right. It is exhausting. Let's make it easier for everyone.
